about_description: VODUM is an advanced management tool for Plex/Jellyfin including sync operations, user management, libraries, logs, scheduled tasks and more.
admin_email_missing: Admin email is not configured. Please set it in Settings before sending test emails.
auth.reset_available_restart: Reset file detected. Restart the container now to reset the credentials.
auth.reset_explain_1: For security reasons, password reset requires local access to the server (Unraid / SSH / console).
auth.reset_not_available: Reset unavailable: no reset file was found on the server.
auth.reset_note_path: Tip: adjust the path according to the actual appdata location of your container.
auth.reset_step_1: Create a reset file on the server.
auth.reset_step_1_simple: Create a reset file on the server.
auth.reset_step_3: Open the reset page and enter the token, new email, and new password.
auth.reset_step_3_setup: Open the interface and redefine the admin email and password.
auth.reset_subtitle: Local access only • Not available remotely
auth.setup_admin_description: Set the admin email and password before configuring servers.
backup_restore_success_restart: Backup restored. Please restart the container to apply the restored database.
backup_retention_desc: Defines how many days backups are kept before being automatically removed.
brand_name_hint: Name displayed in emails (if empty, Vodum will be used).
campaign_test_failed: Failed to send test campaign email.
check_servers_description: Checks server availability and automatically updates their real name
cleanup_unfriended_processed: {count} user(s) were set to 'unfriended' because they no longer had access to any library.
comm_admin_email_missing: Admin email is missing. Set it first in Settings > General.
comm_allow_user_override: Allow users to override channel order in their profile
comm_attachments_help: Attachments are stored on disk (not in SQLite).
comm_channels_order_example: Example: Discord → Email means VODUM tries Discord first, then falls back to Email if needed.
comm_config_intro: Configure the available communication systems and how VODUM chooses the channel(s) when sending.
comm_days_before_help: Optional. Used by automations that trigger X days before expiration. Leave empty if not applicable.
comm_discord_help: Enable Discord sending and configure the bot token. Users need a Discord User ID in their profile.
comm_discord_token_help: Bot token used to send DMs. Make sure the bot has permission to message users.
comm_email_help: Enable email sending and configure SMTP. VODUM will use it when email is available for a user.
comm_general_help: Choose how VODUM selects the channel(s) when sending a notification or campaign.
comm_help_top: One interface, one set of templates/campaigns. VODUM chooses the channel(s) at send time based on your settings and each user’s availability.
comm_history_note: This is the real delivery history (channel actually used, status, and errors).
comm_key_help: Stable identifier used by automations (example: preavis, relance, fin). Cannot be changed later.
comm_missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
comm_password_help: Tip: for app passwords / OAuth tokens, prefer the provider’s recommended method.
comm_send_mode_help: FIRST: use the first available channel (user override if allowed, else global order). ALL: send on every available channel.
comm_subject_help: Used as the email subject and as the Discord message title (when applicable).
comm_template_key_exists: This key already exists. Please choose another one.
comm_templates_note: Tip: keep the key stable and avoid renaming it once used by tasks.
comm_test_discord_help: Validates the bot token (no message is sent).
comm_test_email_body: This is a test email sent from VODUM (Communications).
comm_test_email_help: Sends a test email to the admin email address.
comm_user_override_note: User override stays in the user profile. If disabled here, the global order is always used.
communications_subtitle: Campaigns, templates, delivery history, and communication settings.
confirm_restore: This will overwrite the current database. Continue?
confirm_restore_hint: This will overwrite the current database. Continue?
create_backup_desc: Immediately generates a SQLite database backup in the backup directory.
credits_text: Thank you for using VODUM! Developed with ❤️ to make your media servers easier to manage.
dashboard_subtitle: Overview of your users and servers
default_subscription_days_help: Number of days automatically applied to new users.
delete_after_expiry_days: Delete user X days after expiration
delete_after_expiry_days_help: Removes media server access after X days. Plex: the user is not deleted from Plex, only the library shares are revoked.
delete_user_after_expiry: Delete user X days after expiration
discord_campaign_note: Campaigns are sent to users with Discord set. If a server is selected, only users linked to that server are targeted.
discord_connect_first: Connect a Discord bot token first
discord_delete_bot_confirm: Delete this bot? Discord will be disabled.
discord_have_bot_help: Paste your bot token and VODUM will connect and fill the bot name automatically.
discord_have_bot_title: I already have a Discord bot
discord_help_1: To send DMs, VODUM needs a Discord bot token and each user's Discord ID.
discord_help_create_steps: Steps: Create an application → Add a bot → Reset token if needed → Copy/paste the token here.
discord_help_need_bot: Create a bot in Discord Developer Portal and copy its token
discord_help_need_user_id: Fill each user's Discord user ID (snowflake) in the user page
discord_note_tasks: Discord tasks are enabled/disabled automatically with the switch.
discord_saved_bot_help: Select a bot saved in the database. Its token will be used for sending DMs.
discord_token_help: Token is stored in DB. Regenerate it if it leaked.
discord_vodum_bot_help: VODUM will create a bot record. You still need to create the bot in the Discord Developer Portal and paste its token here.
discord_vodum_steps: 1) Create a bot in the Discord Developer Portal • 2) Copy the bot token • 3) Paste it below and click Activate.
dont_close_tab: Don’t close this window while the file is being uploaded.
grant_access_active_success: Access granted for active users of the server.
grant_active_users: Grant access to active users of the server
grant_all_users: Grant access to all users of this server
jellyfin_server_created_sync_planned: Jellyfin server created. Initial synchronization scheduled.
mail_history_desc: All sent emails (automatic user emails + campaigns).
mail_history_hint: Tip: purging also clears the history shown in user details and the campaign history.
mailing_disabled_help: Mailing is disabled. Enable it to configure SMTP, create campaigns or manage templates.
maintenance_restart_required: Please restart the container to resume using the application.
maintenance_restore_done_desc: The database has been successfully restored.
manual_backup_desc: Immediately creates a SQLite database backup.
max_streams_override_help: If set, this number supersedes max_streams_per_user policies for this user. 0 is allowed.
merge.master.label: Master user (kept)
merge.preview.title: What will be moved
merge.title: User merge mode
merge.warning: This action is irreversible. The displayed user will be kept.
merge_confirm: Do you confirm merging this user?
merge_confirm_tip_text: Select the user to merge, then click “Merge” to load the preview. Then confirm the final step.
merge_confirm_warning: Warning: this action is irreversible. The target account will be merged into the master account.
monitoring.subtitle: Global Plex / Jellyfin overview
monitoring.table.title: Title
monitoring.title: Monitoring
name: Name
no_active_users_for_server: No active users for this server
no_backups: No backups found in the configured directory.
no_libraries: No libraries associated with this server.
no_tasks_found: No tasks found in the database.
no_users_for_server: No users currently have access to this server.
notification_system_order_example: Example: Discord → Email means VODUM tries Discord first, then falls back to Email if needed.
notification_system_order_help: VODUM tries each channel in this order. If a channel is unavailable or fails, it automatically tries the next one.
notifications_fallback_help: Used only if the primary channel is unavailable or fails.
notifications_order_help: Comma-separated channels, e.g. discord,email or email,discord. Used for fallback.
notifications_primary_help: Main channel used to send notifications.
policies_allow_local_ip_help: Local/private IPs will not count toward stream/IP limits.
policies_intro: Define rules to limit or control active streams in real time.
policies_max_value_help: Maximum allowed value for this rule.
policies_note_providers: Policies apply to Plex and Jellyfin servers depending on configuration.
policies_selector_help: Choose which session will be terminated if the rule is violated.
policies_warn_text_default: You have reached the allowed number of simultaneous streams.
recent_events_hint: Shows the latest events and actions recorded by Vodum.
restore_backup_desc: Upload a previously saved .db file. Warning: current database will be overwritten.
server_users: Users with access to this server
settings_index_hint: Open a section to edit settings. Each section has its own Save button.
settings_section_general_desc: Language, timezone, admin credentials and brand name.
settings_section_notifications_desc: Delays before expiry + notification channel order (with fallback).
settings_section_subscription_desc: Default subscription duration and expiry behavior.
settings_section_system_desc: Scheduled tasks, maintenance and debug options.
smtp_custom_help_intro: Select a provider to see detailed help
smtp_custom_help_requirements: For a custom SMTP server, enter:
smtp_custom_requirements_intro: For a custom SMTP server, enter:
smtp_custom_select_provider_help: Select a provider from the list to see detailed help.
smtp_custom_tls_ssl: TLS or SSL depending on the provider
smtp_gmail_password_warning: Regular Google passwords do not work for SMTP.
smtp_gmail_regular_passwords_no_work: Regular Google passwords do not work for SMTP.
smtp_help_custom: Use the SMTP parameters provided by your hosting provider or email service.
smtp_help_gmail: Use your Gmail address and an application-specific password (2-step verification required).
smtp_help_outlook: Use your Outlook/Office365 account. SMTP host is smtp.office365.com, port 587 with TLS.
smtp_help_yahoo: Use your Yahoo address with an application-specific password. Host smtp.mail.yahoo.com.
smtp_outlook_smtp_enabled: SMTP enabled in the Microsoft account
smtp_test_body: This is a test email to verify your SMTP configuration.
smtp_test_info: Test emails are always sent to the admin email address.
subject: Subject
subscription_apply_bulk_help: This takes a snapshot and replaces existing subscription policies.
subscription_apply_bulk_title: Apply template to all users of a server
subscription_apply_no_users: No users found for this server.
subscription_apply_replace_confirm: This will replace the current subscription for affected users. Continue?
subscription_apply_replace_warning: Warning: some users already have a subscription template.
subscription_expiry_mode_disable_help: On the expiration date, VODUM removes the user's library access on Plex/Jellyfin. The account is NOT deleted on the media server (Plex users are kept; only access is revoked).
subscription_expiry_mode_none_help: No action will be taken when the subscription expires.
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_help: On the expiration date, VODUM creates a strict, system-managed policy for this user (message displayed when the stream is stopped). After X days, VODUM removes the user's library access on Plex/Jellyfin. If the subscription is renewed, the policy is automatically removed.
subscription_expiry_mode_warn_title: Show "subscription expired" warning, then disable after X days
subscription_overridden_tooltip: User has overrides in profile (e.g. max_streams_override). Subscription is not the absolute truth.
subscription_reset_notice: Reminders and warnings will be reset if the new expiration date is later than the previous one.
subscription_template_delete_confirm: Delete this template? Users will be unassigned, existing snapshot policies remain.
subscription_template_name_exists: A template with this name already exists.
subscription_templates_policies_help: Build policies like in Monitoring → Policies
subscriptions_all_users_hint: This section displays all users across all servers
subscriptions_server_users_hint: This section displays only users linked to this server
support_text: If you need help or want to report an issue, please contact the platform administrator.
support_thanks: If you enjoy VODUM and want to support its development, you can buy me a coffee.
task.cleanup_logs: Automatic cleanup of logs older than 7 days
task_description.check_mailing_status: Checks whether emailing is enabled and automatically activates or deactivates related tasks
task_description.check_servers: Checks server availability and updates their real name.
task_description.check_update: Checks GitHub to detect if an update is available.
task_description.cleanup_backups: Deletes backups older than the retention period.
task_description.cleanup_unfriended: Detects friends without any library and marks them as unfriended.
task_description.disable_expired_users: Removes library access for expired subscriptions.
task_description.expired_subscription_ma: System: show "subscription expired" policy, then disable access after X days
task_description.import_tautulli: Import watch history from a Tautulli database (tautulli.db).
task_description.send_expiration_emails: Automatically sends pre-expiration, reminder and expired-account emails.
task_description.stream_enforcer: Enforces streaming policies and limits active sessions.
task_description.sync_jellyfin: Syncs Jellyfin accounts and library access.
task_description.sync_plex: Fetches users/libraries and updates the database.
tautulli_copying_db: Copying Tautulli database and starting the import.
tautulli_import_only_available_libraries: Skip libraries that do not exist in VODUM.
tautulli_import_options_desc: Choose how VODUM should import historical data from Tautulli.
tautulli_import_tip: Tip: you can logout — VODUM will keep the import result and show it later.
tautulli_keep_all_libraries_desc: Import all libraries even if they are not configured.
tautulli_keep_all_servers_desc: Import the Plex server referenced by this Tautulli DB even if it does not exist in VODUM. If enabled, VODUM will create an offline Plex server entry and import into it.
tautulli_keep_all_users_desc: Import users even if they do not exist in VODUM. They will be created as expired to avoid triggering emails/policies.
tautulli_libraries_policy_desc: Define how libraries should be handled during import.
tautulli_select_file_first: Please select a Tautulli database file first (.db).
tautulli_target_server_desc: Select which VODUM server the imported data will belong to.
template_test_help: A test email will be sent to the admin email configured in settings.
title: Title
user_notification_order_override_help: Notification delivery order for this user (if allowed in Settings).
user_notifications_can_override: User accounts can override the order
user_notifications_can_override_help: If enabled, the Email/Discord order can be set per user in the user profile.
user_saved_and_plex_sync_started: Changes saved and Plex synchronization started
username_display_help: VODUM display name. Plex/Jellyfin usernames are shown in the Media tab.
warn_then_disable_days_help: Minimum 1. Example: 7 means the user sees the warning policy for up to 7 days, then access is revoked.
communications.campaigns.discord_desc: Create and send Discord campaigns to your users.
communications.campaigns.email_desc: Create and send email campaigns to your users.
communications.channel_hint: Choose a channel to view related pages.
communications.config.allow_override_hel: If enabled, a user’s order override can change the routing.
communications.config.discord_desc: Configure the Discord bot token and default channel.
communications.config.mode_help: Choose how VODUM selects the channel when sending notifications.
communications.config.routing_desc: Configure the channel order and per-user overrides.
communications.history.discord_desc: See sent Discord messages and delivery status.
communications.history.email_desc: See sent emails and delivery status.
communications.templates.discord_desc: Manage Discord templates used by campaigns and automations.
communications.templates.email_desc: Manage email templates used by campaigns and automations.
communications.templates.note_body: Tip: keep templates generic, then personalize with variables in campaigns.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
comm_trigger_provider_help: Limit sending to Plex, Jellyfin, or both.
comm_days_after_help: For templates triggered after user creation. 0 = immediate, >0 = scheduled.
comm_trigger_help_bubble: 📌 Expiration → Days before. User creation → Days after (0 immediate / >0 scheduled). Use Plex/Jellyfin filter to target the right provider.
comm_delay_help: Choose whether the notification is sent before or after the trigger, then set the number of days.
invalid_expiration_date_format: Invalid expiration date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD.
invalid_renewal_date_format: Invalid renewal date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD.
web_security_desc: These settings control how the login session cookie behaves when VODUM is exposed through a web server.
secure_cookies_help: Recommended when VODUM is accessed through HTTPS. The session cookie will not be sent over plain HTTP.
cookie_samesite_help: Use Lax by default. Use None only if you need cross-site cookies, and only with HTTPS.
trust_reverse_proxy_help: Enable only if VODUM is behind a trusted reverse proxy (Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, SWAG, etc.). This allows proper use of X-Forwarded-* headers.
task_description.refresh_dashboard_quote: Builds the dashboard quote of the day.
server_delete_started: Server deletion started in background. This may take a little while.
server_delete_already_running: A deletion is already running for this server.
task_description.process_referral_reward: Qualifies eligible referrals, grants reward days and sends the notification.
referral_settings_intro: Configure here how referrals work in VODUM.
referral_settings_block_program_help: These settings define when a referred user is considered valid.
referral_settings_block_reward_help: These settings define how many days the referrer earns and whether a notification is sent.
referral_enabled_help: Fully enables the referral system in VODUM.
referral_qualification_days_help: Number of days the referred user must stay in an allowed status before the referral is validated.
referral_allow_referrer_change_before_qu: Allows correcting the referrer only before qualification.
referral_reward_enabled_help: When enabled, the referrer receives bonus days after qualification.
referral_reward_days_help: Number of days added to the referrer expiration date.
referral_auto_notify_reward_help: Automatically sends a message to the referrer when the reward is granted.
referral_eligible_statuses_help: The referred user must be in one of these statuses at the end of the qualification period.
referrer_picker_help: Choose a referrer from the list of active users. “No referrer” clears the selection.
user_referral_section_help: This section shows the current referrer, the referral status and this user's referred users.
referred_users_help: Users currently attached to this referrer.
subscriptions_settings_expiry_desc: Configure here the default subscription duration and what happens when a subscription expires.
